'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 59''' is the fifty-ninth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[April 11]], [[1979]].

This issue includes part three of a black & white four-part reprinting of the unfinished story "[[The Kingdom of Ice]]", originally published in color in [[Marvel Comics|Marvel UK]]' ''[[Pizzazz]]'' magazine. The final part of the story was eventually printed in [[Star Wars Weekly 60|''Star Wars Weekly'' 60]].

==Contents==
*"[[The Ice Worm Cometh!]]"
*"[[Showdown (Pizzazz)|Showdown]]"
*"The power of Warlock Part 6: In-Betweener!"
*"Micronauts Part 4: Death-Duel at Daytona Beach!" (Continuation)
*"Tales of the Watcher: Earth is off-limits!"
